emails.subject: RE: Resolution No 9
emails.body: Jarek I have discussed this with Jacek. The reason for increasing Jacek's package is retention. Adam To: Cattigan, Ed; Overfield, Adam; Forycki, Krzysztof; Edgley, Anne; Wantschek, Lloyd; Derrick Jr., James

emails.subject: RE: Resolution No 9
emails.body: The package is significantly higher than what the industry peers would receive in this position and in this market. I wish we had a chance to discuss this issue internally first. In case I were to retain him as part of Enron Poland at a later date I can not justify this level of remuneration as part of my budget. Jarek To: Astramowicz, Jarek; Cattigan, Ed; Forycki, Krzysztof; Edgley, Anne; Wantschek, Lloyd; Derrick Jr., James

emails.subject: RE: Resolution No 9
emails.body: Jarek We were having some retention problems with Jacek for a variety of reasons. After discussion in London we decided to increase his package. I believe it is highly unlikely that Jacek would be interested in working out of the Warsaw office for Enron Poland. Adam To: Overfield, Adam; Cattigan, Ed; Forycki, Krzysztof; Edgley, Anne; Wantschek, Lloyd; Derrick Jr., James

emails.subject: RE: Resolution No 9
emails.body: so be it To: Astramowicz, Jarek; Cattigan, Ed; Forycki, Krzysztof; Edgley, Anne; Wantschek, Lloyd; Derrick Jr., James
